articles.title: XRP Marks Another Milestone As Dubai Brings $16 Billion In Real Estate Company To The Blockchain – Details
articles.description: XRP has achieved another impressive milestone with the Dubai Land Department’s announcement of a $16 billion real estate tokenization project on the XRP Ledger (XRPL). This development has been lauded as one of the factors that could spark an XRP price rally.
